title: Intent/FileSet spec
description: The desired-state payload for a file-distribution Intent (charter §2.4, §4.2 'content-addressed … checksum Facets'; ADR-0036). One Intent manages one file: `digest` is the expected sha256 the compiled Baseline observes for drift; `key` is a dot-free slug naming the file inside the `fileset.content` Facet (the Facet-path evaluator splits on '.', so the key must be dot-free). `source` points at the content (object-store ref); v1 delivers by source-ref — content-addressed OCI artifacts on the Bundle rails (ADR-0032) are the documented next layer. Typed at the seam per §1.1.

key.description: dot-free slug for this managed file within the fileset.content Facet

path.description: absolute destination path on the target host

digest.description: expected content sha256 — the drift key observed as fileset.content.<key>.digest

source.description: content source ref (object-store key); the remediation Workflow resolves it
